overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse through a foggy coastal landscape. The journey begins at a traditional salt production facility with evaporation ponds and thatched huts, continues through misty forests with wildflowers, and culminates at a coastal cliff with a dramatic ocean vista before turning inland into the Shattered Coast region.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional salt production facility with evaporation ponds

events.description: on-screen text 'Salt Production' appears identifying the location
horse slows to approach a worker sitting among the salt ponds

agents.ego_description: riding a horse through the salt works, navigating between evaporation ponds and wooden platforms

notable_agents.action: worker sitting on a wooden platform among salt evaporation ponds

entered.detail: shallow rectangular pools for salt evaporation with white salt deposits
large traditional hut with straw roof and wooden frame
wooden walkways and tables with piles of harvested salt
tall tree with spreading branches overlooking the salt works

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a foggy salt production facility with shallow evaporation ponds and traditional thatched huts. The samurai rides a black and white horse along a dirt path between wooden platforms laden with salt, approaching a worker sitting among the ponds.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional wooden house with water channels and bridges

events.description: passing the thatched hut and approaching a wooden residential building
crossing a small wooden bridge over narrow water channels

agents.ego_description: riding past the salt works and through a small settlement with traditional wooden buildings and water channels

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden house with lattice windows and dark timber frame
narrow water canals with wooden bridges crossing them
yellow wildflowers growing in dense patches along the path edges

segments.scene_description: Leaving the salt production area behind, the rider approaches a traditional wooden building with lattice windows. The path crosses small wooden bridges over water channels, and yellow wildflowers begin to appear along the trail as the settlement transitions to open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest trail leading to coastal shrine

events.description: emerging from dense forest to approach a large red torii gate
exiting the tree cover into brighter coastal light with ocean becoming visible

agents.ego_description: galloping through a misty forest path lined with wildflowers and rocks, approaching a shrine gate

entered.detail: dense forest with tall trees creating a canopy over the path
large red wooden shrine gate marking the entrance to the coastal area
rocky cliff edge beginning to appear through the mist
calm blue sea visible through the fog beyond the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense, misty forest with yellow wildflowers lining both sides. As the rider approaches a large red torii gate, the trees thin out to reveal a dramatic coastal cliff and the ocean beyond, with the fog creating a mystical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook with panoramic ocean view

events.description: passing under the torii gate onto the coastal cliff with panoramic ocean view
on-screen text 'Shattered Coast' appears identifying the region
turning inland away from the coast into the foggy forest

agents.ego_description: riding along the coastal cliff edge enjoying the ocean vista before turning inland into the fog

entered.detail: simple wooden fence marking the path edge along the cliff

segments.scene_description: Passing under the torii gate, the rider emerges onto a grassy coastal cliff with a breathtaking view of the calm ocean stretching to the horizon. After a moment overlooking the water, the horse turns inland away from the coast, entering the foggy Shattered Coast region as the forest closes in again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy salt production facility that gradually opens into a dramatic coastal vista before turning back into a misty wilderness. It begins along a dirt path between shallow evaporation ponds and thatched huts, following a samurai on a black and white horse as they pass wooden platforms laden with salt. As the rider leaves the settlement, the path crosses small wooden bridges and passes a lattice-windowed building, with yellow wildflowers appearing as the landscape transitions into the open countryside. The scene then shifts into a dense, misty forest where the trees eventually thin out to reveal a large red torii gate standing before a breathtaking view of the calm ocean from a grassy cliff. Finally, after a moment overlooking the horizon, the horse turns away from the coast and rides inland, entering the foggy Shattered Coast region as the forest closes in once more.
